title: Indiumm's Optimization
description: A lightweight and balanced optimization modpack for Minecraft 1.21.11 that significantly boosts performance using carefully chosen performance mods. It also adds useful quality of life features without overloading the game or changing the vanilla feel.
body: This Minecraft 1.21.11 optimization modpack is made to significantly improve FPS, reduce lag, and make the game run smoother, especially on low to mid end PCs. It includes carefully selected performance and quality of life mods while staying lightweight, balanced, and close to the vanilla experience.
